title: Software Engineer Intern at Verily
subtitle: Summer 2022, from Cornell to California
summary: The internship that turned graduate school into a clearer engineering path, connecting Cornell coursework with California life and later full-time work.

gallery.alt: Haoyang in the Bay Area during the Verily internship summer
gallery.caption: Work, relocation, and weekend travel started to blur into one California chapter.

detail.text: This internship marks a real shift in the story of the graph. It is less about papers and experiments, and more about software teams, production thinking, and the rhythm of engineering work in practice.

items: Overlapped with summer travel and the California Route 1 trip
Converted into the full-time role that follows in the graph
